polyline.style: stroke: rgb(108,78,235); stroke-width: 2.4; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 10; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

path.style: stroke: rgb(108,78,235); stroke-width: 2.4; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: square; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 10; fill: none; fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;
